case_title: BLUE CIELO CORPORATION VS. ROBERT MACDUFF

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUE CIELO CORPORATION DBA MIRACLE METHOD OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-10-2014 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506.APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY.PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CLAIR GRAY - PRESIDENT PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
